description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a classic single-cutaway design, featuring a sunburst finish that transitions from a warm amber center to a deep reddish-brown edge. The body is contoured and fitted with a white pickguard, two humbucker pickups, and four gold control knobs for volume and tone adjustment. The neck is dark wood, likely rosewood or ebony, with inlaid fret markers and a set-in construction. The bridge is a tune-o-matic style, and the hardware is metallic, likely chrome or nickel-plated. The headstock is angled and fitted with six tuning pegs, three on each side, and a truss rod cover. This guitar is visually reminiscent of iconic models used in rock and blues music, with a robust and polished appearance suitable for performance or display in urban environments.
description: A sunburst-finished, single-cutaway electric guitar with dual humbuckers, gold knobs, and a white pickguard. The body is contoured and the neck features inlaid fret markers and a classic angled headstock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sunburst finish, white pickguard, dual humbucker pickups, four gold knobs, and the full fretboard.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's thickness, contoured body, and the raised bridge and control knobs.
description_view_2: Reverse side view displaying the back contour, neck joint, and the edge of the hardware and controls.
description_view_3: Angled top-down view emphasizing the body shape, pickup arrangement, and the layout of the control knobs and pickguard.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side, truss rod cover, and no visible logo
